skipConfirm.title: Skip onboarding?
skipConfirm.desc: It won't take long! You can always revisit from Settings.

agent.title: Pick your default agent
agent.subtitle: Braid works with every CLI agent. Choose the one you'll reach for most. Switch any time.

welcome.title: Welcome to Braid
welcome.story: Braid weaves multiple AI coding agents together with Git worktrees - so you can run parallel tasks on separate branches, review diffs, manage PRs, and ship faster, all from one window.
welcome.subtitle: Run multiple coding agents in parallel, each on its own branch.
welcome.description: Braid combines Claude AI with Git worktrees so you can manage multiple tasks at once - without context switching.

theme.title: Make it feel like home
theme.subtitle: Pick the look you want to stare at for hours.
theme.moreHint: More themes available in Settings > Appearance.

notifications.title: Set up notifications
notifications.subtitle: Braid will notify you when agents are done or need help.
notifications.allowDesc: Open System Settings and make sure Braid is allowed to send notifications.
notifications.chooseSoundHint: Pick the alert Braid plays after a desktop notification is delivered.
notifications.permissionRequired: Enable notifications in System Settings, then try again.

integrations.title: Connect your integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect GitHub or Jira to get the most out of Braid.
integrations.benefit1: See issue state, PR review status, and CI checks on every worktree
integrations.benefit2: Read, comment on, and merge pull requests without leaving Braid
integrations.benefit3: Track Jira issues, sprints, and assignees alongside your code
integrations.ghDesc: Pull requests, issues, and check status.

doctor.title: Environment Check
doctor.subtitle: Making sure your tools are ready

project.title: Point Braid at some code
project.subtitle: Open a folder or clone a repo to get started.
project.openFolderDesc: Choose any local directory, git repo or not.
project.cloneRepoDesc: Paste an HTTPS or SSH URL.
project.notARepo: That folder is not a Git repository.

explore.title: Explore Braid
explore.subtitle: Take a quick tour of what Braid can do.
explore.feature1: Run multiple AI agents on separate branches
explore.feature2: Review diffs, PRs, and CI checks in one place
explore.feature4: Mission Control kanban for cross-branch oversight

ghAuth.title: Sign in to GitHub
ghAuth.instruction: Enter this code on GitHub to connect your account.

available.title: Update Available
available.body: Braid v{{version}} is ready to download.

ready.title: Update Ready
ready.body: Braid v{{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to apply the update.

error.title: Update Failed
error.body: Something went wrong while checking for updates.

sidebar.title: Your Projects
sidebar.description: Your projects and worktrees live here. Each worktree is an isolated branch you can work on simultaneously.

addWorktree.title: Create a Worktree
addWorktree.description: Create a new worktree to start working on a branch. Each worktree is a fully isolated copy of your repo.

chatPanel.title: Chat with Claude
chatPanel.description: Chat with Claude to write code, fix bugs, and build features. Use @ to mention files and / for slash commands.

sessionTabs.title: Session & File Tabs
sessionTabs.description: Run multiple chat sessions per worktree. Open files as editor tabs alongside your chats.

rightPanel.title: Files, Changes & Checks
rightPanel.description: Browse your project files, view git changes, and monitor CI status — all in one panel.

terminal.title: Integrated Terminal
terminal.description: Run commands, view logs, and execute scripts without leaving the app.

missionControl.title: Mission Control
missionControl.description: See all your worktrees at a glance. Track running sessions, PRs, and CI status across your entire project.

intro.title: Simulator Preview
intro.description: Preview and control iOS & Android simulators directly in Braid. Tap, swipe, and type on the live device screen.

devices.title: Your Devices
devices.description: This is where your available simulators appear. Boot a device to power it on, then connect to start streaming.

connect.title: Boot & Connect
connect.description: Tap Boot to start a device, then Connect to stream its screen. You can also link it to your chat so Claude can see the UI.
